archetype_description: Strong in one-day races and sprint-accessible opportunities, with limited GC emphasis.
profile_rationale: The saved 2026 results include meaningful one-day conversion and sprint-accessible scoring lanes.
The local artifact mix points much more clearly to a classics-and-finishing-speed profile than a GC-centric one.
This custom mix lets TotalEnergies lean harder into the races it currently looks best built to exploit.
